timeline.label: ego stopped at gate w/ pedestrian+cart
resumed motion; pedestrian passes very close to front-left

hypotheses.summary: Ego remains stationary for ~90s at a parking-lot egress with a pedestrian and hand-cart in the lane under an already-raised drop-arm barrier, with no observable progress or escalation.

evidence.snippet: Ego at gate; barrier arm raised; pedestrian and small cart in near lane; parked sedans left.
Same viewpoint as t=45s — hood crest, barrier angle, parked-car positions identical; no yaw/translation.
Still identical framing; cart shifted a few pixels, ego has not advanced.
Fourth consecutive 30s-spaced sample with no ego pose change — ~90s cumulative dwell.

hypotheses.patch_hint: Add progress watchdog in behavior planner: if v<0.1 m/s with dynamic obstacle in corridor for >15s, attempt bypass/horn; >45s escalate to remote assistance; >90s execute minimum-risk pull-over.

hypotheses.summary: Forward camera stream is globally saturated at session start, indicating auto-exposure/gain failed to converge for the first ~15-30s.

evidence.snippet: Entire image near-white (luma>240); only faint blue LiDAR projection overlay visible — no scene content recoverable.

hypotheses.patch_hint: Add camera-health monitor: if median luminance > 240 for >2s, raise SENSOR_DEGRADED and inhibit forward motion until stream recovers; verify AE initial gain/shutter on node start.

hypotheses.summary: When ego finally resumes motion it passes the previously-blocking pedestrian at very small lateral clearance off the front-left corner.

evidence.snippet: Woman in dark dress at extreme left image edge, lower body cropped by hood line — estimated lateral gap <1 m while ego is moving.

hypotheses.patch_hint: Enforce minimum lateral clearance (>=1.0 m scaled by speed) around pedestrian-class obstacles in trajectory optimizer; slow or halt if constraint infeasible.

patch_proposal: Primary: add liveness/progress watchdog to behavior planner with tiered escalation (courtesy signal -> remote assist -> safe pull-over) so ego cannot dwell indefinitely behind a dynamic obstacle. Secondary: camera-saturation health gate and pedestrian lateral-clearance constraint.
